props.name: selectionKeys
props.description: A map instance of key-value pairs to represented the selected nodes.

props.name: collapsedKeys
props.description: A map instance of key-value pairs to represented the collapsed nodes.

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Whether the nodes can be expanded or toggled.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: node-select
events.description: Callback to invoke when a suggestion is selected.

events.name: node-unselect
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is unselected.

events.name: node-expand
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is expanded.

events.name: node-collapsed
events.description: Callback to invoke when a node is collapsed.

slots.name: togglericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Curent state of the node */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: toggleicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Curent state of the node */ expanded: boolean; }): VNode[]
